summary: Iteration 24: Comprehensive testing of Public Content API & API Key Management. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Admin Panel API Keys tab fully functional with key creation, toggle, and delete capabilities.

passed_tests: POST /api/apikeys/create - Creates new API key with kn_ prefix and returns raw key
GET /api/apikeys/list - Returns all API keys with usage stats (requests_today, total_requests, daily_limit)
GET /api/apikeys/{key_id}/usage - Returns detailed usage stats for a key
PUT /api/apikeys/{key_id}/toggle - Toggles key active/inactive status correctly
DELETE /api/apikeys/{key_id} - Permanently deletes key and returns 404 for nonexistent keys
GET /api/public/v1/feed with valid X-API-Key returns status:ok with articles
GET /api/public/v1/categories returns 10 categories with en/te labels
Revoked API key returns 403 error (tested toggle flow)
Admin Panel login via OTP (9876543210/123456) works correctly
Admin Panel API Keys tab visible and accessible

api_key_management.create_key: Creates keys with kn_ prefix, stores hash, shows raw key once
api_key_management.list_keys: Shows all keys with prefix masking, usage stats (today/total/daily_limit/last_used)
api_key_management.usage_tracking: Tracks per-day usage and total requests automatically

public_api_endpoints.feed: /api/public/v1/feed - Returns paginated articles with category/lang filters

authentication.revoked_key: Returns 403 with 'API key has been revoked' message
authentication.rate_limiting: Enforced at daily_limit per key (1000 default)

admin_ui.create_form: Partner Name input + Daily Limit input + Create button
admin_ui.key_display: Shows created key once with copy button, warns 'won't be shown again'
admin_ui.key_list: Shows Active API Keys count, key name, prefix, status badge, usage stats, toggle/delete buttons
admin_ui.integration_guide: Shows 4 endpoints with method/path/description + example code + query params

critical_code_review_comments: public_api.py: Well-structured with proper rate limiting using in-memory dict (Note: in-memory rate limits reset on server restart - consider Redis for production)
ApiKeysManager.jsx: Good UX with one-time key display warning, copy functionality, and integration guide
Key security: Hash stored in DB, prefix only shown in list (kn_xxxx...), raw key shown only at creation
seed_data_creation: Created test API key 'TEST_Partner_xxxxx' during backend tests (cleaned up after). UITestKey created during frontend test (deleted after).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public Content API fully tested and working: 4 endpoints (/feed, /articles/{id}, /categories, /search) require X-API-Key header. Admin key management at /api/apikeys/* (create, list, toggle, delete, usage). Admin login via /reporter-login with phone 9876543210 and OTP 123456. API Keys tab in Admin Panel at /admin shows key management UI with data-testid='admin-apikeys-tab'. TestPartner key exists in DB with 3 requests already. Rate limiting is in-memory (resets on restart).

design_notes.api_keys_tab_ui: Clean design with Create form at top, Active keys list in middle, Integration Guide at bottom
design_notes.color_scheme: Consistent with app theme - orange accent, white/slate backgrounds
design_notes.status_badges: Green 'Active' / Red 'Revoked' badges for key status
design_notes.key_creation_ux: Green success box appears after creation with copy button, warning text about one-time display
